final:
module adc_8bit (
    input [2:0] voltage_level,
    output reg [7:0] digital_output
);

always @(*) begin
    digital_output = voltage_level * 32; // Scale the 3-bit input to 8-bit output
end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      digital_output <= ~digital_output;
    end
  end

endmodule
